titleStmt.title: SII 6.849: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 849. (A.R. No. 286-D of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śākābdē ·ṛturāmavahniśaśisaṁkhyē yēbdhi
sūnāviṣē paṁcamyāṁ sitapakṣagē guhimahā
sēnāpatirdattavān . paṭunāyaka Ēṣa sapratima
kaṁ dīpaṁ hi padmātmajaścaṁdrārkāvadhi haryagē nṛha
rāyabhiṣṭārtthasiddyai stiraṁ . svasti śrī . śakavarṣaṁbulu 1336
gunēṁṭi Āśvija kṛ 5 bu pōṭnurivīṭi padumamahasēnā
pati koḍuku kaḷiṁgapaṭṭanayaṁḍu guhimavāsēnā
pati tamaku Abhiṣṭārttasiddhiganu śrīnarasiṁhyanā(ṁ)thuni
sannidhinni nityamunnu veluṁganu pratimāsahitamaina
Akhaṁḍadīpamu peṭenu Iṁdukai golla saṁdakā māṁkabōyani
koḍuku caṁḍibōyiṁḍu garabōyaṁḍu Ī Iddaṟavasananu
peṭṭina goṟṟelu nuṟu 100 ṭini nityamai neyi Aḍḍalekhkhanu nela
ku Ēḍu dūmunnu kuṁceṁḍu nētilekhkha 7 . bhaṁḍḍaramaṁdu beṭa
galāṁḍu Ī Iddaṟakunnu kuḍujītamunnu manōharamuga ganape
ṭṭitimi vīru ĀcadrārkastaIganu Ī neyi teci peṭaṁggalāru Ī
dharmu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śrīśrīśrī Ī dhatvamu ti
rumajyana Avasaramaṁdu nuṁkalapedimahāsēnapati A
lavaṭṭapaṭṭanu veṁḍi ṭaṁkalu 6 peṭṭi I nayakana prasada
lānaku Aḍa peṭṭenu I Ālābhāṭi paṭaṁgalāḍu .
Digital edition of SII 6.849 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
